name: Best Ever Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces chopped fresh spinach, rinsed well
1/2 cup evaporated milk (use skim evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cheeses, onion, oil, and seasonings until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, milk, and spinach to the mixture.
3. Pour into a pre-baked pie crust shell prepared according to box directions.
4. Bake at 375 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Cool for 10 to 15 minutes before serving.
Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
